description: A flash flood warning has been issued for the facility. As the Facility Manager, identify assets in vulnerable basement rooms and tag them for either relocation or protection-in-place in OpenMaint (admin/admin) according to the 'Flood Prep Protocol' at /home/ga/Desktop/flood_protocol.txt. Update the Description of assets in the specified rooms by appending '[RELOCATE]' or '[PROTECT]' as instructed and create a Corrective Maintenance Work Order with Critical priority to mobilize the moving team. Note: Sump pumps are critical mechanical equipment and must be protected.
